assessment.note: Pivoted from the missing-work prompt to pride in the migration plan and cutover, which is off-signature for this question; [THREAD-DEFERRED] pride in the migration plan/cutover is worth picking up next session.

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?
new_queue.description: Opener that invites a real answer rather than 'fine'. Reads wellbeing directly.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

new_queue.label: Next quarter shape
new_queue.name: What do you see yourself owning next quarter?
new_queue.description: Gets her to name the shape of her upcoming scope before any new work is introduced.

new_queue.label: Mentoring intent
new_queue.name: What would mentoring actually look like in your week?
new_queue.description: Turns a vague aspiration into a concrete shape and tests whether it is realistic now.

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would you want more of from me right now?
new_queue.description: Finds the specific support she wants without assuming the answer.

new_queue.label: Next-two-weeks focus
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks feel smoother for you?
new_queue.description: Closes by converting the conversation into a concrete support need or adjustment.
